nasb.text: Give wings to Moab, For she will flee away; And her cities will become a desolation, Without inhabitants in them.

esv.text: “Give wings to Moab, for she would fly away; her cities shall become a desolation, with no inhabitant in them.

cnv.text: 你們要在摩押上面撒鹽， 因為它必成為廢墟； 它的城鎮必成為荒涼， 沒有人在裡面居住。

ccb.text: “给摩押翅膀让她飞走吧， 因为她的城邑将沦为废墟， 杳无人迹。
